messages.text: The umbral stalker peels out of the dark and rakes you with claws that leave a cold, numb wound behind them. The blow {verb} you!
The umbral stalker lunges from the black and you throw yourself aside as its claws pass through where you stood.
The umbral stalker bears you down and rakes you open, and the cold of the deep floods the wound! The blow {verb} you!
